title: biscutella longifolia subsp. austriaca
intro: Biscutella longifolia subsp. austriaca, also known as the Austrian biscutella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, native to Austria, Germany, and Switzerland. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Biscutella longifolia subsp. austriaca include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the dried flowers in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
